vehicle.label: Tiltrotor VTOL Hybrid
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing VTOL with 2 tilting rotor nacelles, BVLOS long-range capable

parts.label: Center Fuselage Spine
parts.spec: CFRP box beam center fuselage, avionics bay, wing spar socket, front GPS boom mount, belly camera window

parts.label: Main Wing (2-piece)
parts.spec: Straight wing, 4S NACA 2412, dual 15mm CFRP spar, 900mm half-span, 160mm chord, 3-layer CFRP skin

parts.label: Nacelle Assembly x 2
parts.spec: Tilting nacelle assembly, 0-90deg tilt axis, 6309 bearing set, servo-driven worm gear, motor and ESC pocket

parts.label: Tilt Servo + Linkage x 2
parts.spec: 25kg-cm DS3218 servo per nacelle, titanium pushrod, dual ball joints, tilt range 0-93deg, crash-tolerant

parts.label: V-Tail x 2 (Ruddervator)
parts.spec: +-35deg V-tail ruddervator pair, MG996R servo each, 30deg dihedral, CFRP sandwich panel, hinge piano wire

parts.label: Landing Gear (Tri)
parts.spec: Tricycle landing gear, spring-steel skid arms, 55mm dia wheels, CG at 1/3 chord, 200mm wheelbase

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide-In)
parts.spec: Belly slide-in battery bay, 6S 8000mAh Li-ion pack, Velcro + strap dual retention, CG position 28% MAC

parts.label: Payload Nose Bay
parts.spec: Interchangeable nose payload bay, Day/IR camera gimbal or survey sensor, 80x60x50mm, 300g payload limit

parts.label: Tilt-Axis Harness + Datum Service Bay
parts.spec: Tiltrotor integration_service module with tilt-axis harness_channel, slack_loop, interface_datum, service_hatch, connector keying, and nacelle-to-wing load-path inspection access

requirements: Carry wing spar loads into fuselage spine
Provide attachment points for V-tail, ruddervator, stabilizer, and landing gear
Mount GPS boom and belly camera
Ensure service access and inspection windows
Maintain structural integrity under flight loads

risk.desc: Potential misalignment during assembly due to complex interface requirements.
risk.mit: Implement detailed assembly instructions and training for operators.

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure if avionics bay cooling is inadequate.
risk.mit: Conduct thermal analysis and ensure proper ventilation design.

risk.desc: Camera window may be prone to damage during handling.
risk.mit: Add protective cover during transportation and installation.

risk.desc: GPS boom mount might experience stress concentration points.
risk.mit: Review and reinforce the mount design to distribute stresses evenly.

risk.desc: Access cutout may not provide sufficient clearance for tools and hands.
risk.mit: Increase the size of the access cutout to ensure ease of maintenance.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment of wing spar socket and fuselage spine due to manufacturing tolerances.
risk.mit: Implement precise alignment tools and conduct final inspection before assembly.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient preload on bolted connections leading to structural failure under dynamic loads.
risk.mit: Specify torque values and conduct pre-load verification tests during assembly.

risk.desc: Insufficient clearance around moving parts may cause jamming or increased wear over time.
risk.mit: Ensure all critical interfaces have appropriate clearance and conduct regular maintenance checks.

manufacturing_strategy.support: Orientation maintained during FDM and CNC operations

verify.rule: Ensure all specified fields are included in the output.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment during assembly due to clearance tolerances.
risk.mit: Implement tighter assembly tolerances and visual alignment aids.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient clearance for nacelle rotation.
risk.mit: Review and adjust clearance_arc dimensions to ensure adequate rotation.

risk.desc: Possibility of motor and ESC becoming inaccessible over time.
risk.mit: Regularly inspect access_cover integrity and maintain clear access paths.

physics_paths.path: Rotor thrust loads transferred through bearing seats to wing spar
Servo-driven worm gear actuates tilt axis, enabling 0-90deg rotation
Motor and ESC modules accessible through access cover for maintenance

risk.desc: Potential thermal issues due to heat dissipation from servos.
risk.mit: Implement cooling fins or heat sinks near servo locations.

risk.desc: Risk of mechanical failure if pushrod alignment is compromised.

risk.desc: Risk of electrical interference between harness passthrough and adjacent components.
risk.mit: Use shielded cables and ensure proper routing to minimize interference.

verify.rule: Each required evidence feature must appear in part_tree/geometry_ops.
The total mass must not exceed the specified budget.

verify.value: All parts and features are traceable to their respective IDs and names.
verify.rule: Training-quality rule: make part_tree children and geometry_ops mutually traceable by id/name.

verify.value: All interfaces are reciprocal and named with exact neighboring subsystem labels.
verify.rule: Reciprocal interface rule: name exact neighboring subsystem labels when they mate, and choose connection_type + DOF + clearance_mm + required_feature so the neighbor can declare the same joint family back.

verify.value: Critical joints have visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent.
verify.rule: Joint evidence rule: critical joints need visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent.

risk.desc: Potential structural failure due to insufficient rigidity in snap-fit connections.
risk.mit: Increase clearance or add mechanical locks to snap-fit interfaces.

risk.desc: Risk of overloading the fuselage_spine_mount during extreme maneuvers.
risk.mit: Conduct static load tests and reinforce the mount if necessary.

risk.desc: Limited accessibility for maintenance and repair due to small access cuts.
risk.mit: Increase the size of access cuts to improve human reach.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment issues due to loose tolerances in bolted interfaces.
risk.mit: Specify tighter tolerances and conduct alignment checks during assembly.

risk.desc: Risk of fatigue failure in gear_leg due to repetitive loading.
risk.mit: Perform fatigue analysis and consider material upgrades if needed.
